sidebar.clearAllDataDescription: This will permanently delete all uploads, transactions, budgets, and classification rules. Categories will be kept. This action cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.errorLoadingHint: Make sure the API is running: from the backend folder run uvicorn on port 8000, then refresh. Open the app via the Vite dev URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:5173) so /api requests are proxied.
dashboard.backendUnreachableBanner: Could not reach the API (backend may be stopped). This is not related to file upload. Start the backend on port 8000 and use npm run dev so /api is proxied. After the API is up, refresh the page.

upload.title: Upload report
upload.mergeHint: Partial mid-month exports are fine. Re-uploading the same month adds new rows; identical lines are skipped.
upload.replaceHint: Use “replace” only when you want this file to become the full source of truth for that month.
upload.replaceCheckbox: Replace all existing data for this month
upload.confirmReplaceDescription: All uploads and transactions for {{month}} will be permanently deleted, then this file will be imported. This cannot be undone.

review.title: Needs Review
review.emptyTitle: No transactions to review this month 🎉
